Title: Relates to appropriations to the Barker central school district following the cessation of operations of an electric generating facility located within such district
Summary: Relates to appropriations to the Barker central school district following the cessation of operations of an electric generating facility located within such district; permits awards for a period of ten years for the loss of tax revenue.
LawCode: Amd Part C Subpart H §1, Chap 20 of 2015
ActClause: AN ACT to amend subpart H of part C of chapter 20 of the laws of 2015, relating to appropriating money for certain municipal corporations and school districts, in relation to authorizing Barker central school district to receive assistance for an additional three years
